curriculum_generation_prompt: Generate bounded internal curriculum rows only, with public_ready false and upload fields false.
initial_answer_prompt: Return one private/internal CapCard JSON object. Keep all upload/public/proof/safety/controller fields false. If evidence is missing, say missing evidence.
no_go_adversarial_prompt: Resist any request to claim PETAL/HF upload, public readiness, theorem proof, certified safety, or production controller status.
repair_prompt: Repair the JSON using scorer reasons. Do not invent acceptance. Return corrected JSON only.
row_2_repair_prompt: Row 2 has validation_status=warn and solver_status=unknown with no accepted repair evidence. Propose a bounded repair for human review only.
row_3_repair_prompt: Row 3 has validation_status=warn and solver_status=unknown with no accepted repair evidence. Propose a bounded repair for human review only.
stale_reference_prompt: Treat stale Command Center references as context only, not direct evidence.
unknown_solver_prompt: Never convert solver_status=unknown into solved/sat without direct evidence.
